steps.title: Identify what “mixed feelings” requires
steps.content: The narrator must express both positive and negative sentiments about her surroundings in the same statement or observation.

steps.title: Match the emotional contrast
steps.content:
"I'm really getting quite fond of the big room, all but that horrid [wall]paper." uniquely combines approval (“fond of the big room”) with disapproval (“that horrid [wall]paper”) in a single statement.

The other three show only criticism, observation, or disgust—lacking the emotional contrast that defines mixed feelings.

That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
